arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to watch out for this weekend: Piroe to strike against Rams
arts.sum: Mo Salah to find the net in the Merseyside derby will be a popular bet this weekend given the Egyptian's scoring streak but Steve Davies has five other potential goalscorers to look out for.

arts.ttl: Our writers disagree on Birmingham City XI as Chris Davies ponders key change
arts.sum: (4-2-3-1): Allsop; Bielik, Klarer, Davies, Cochrane; Iwata, Paik; Laird, Willumsson, Stansfield; May (4-2-3-1): Allsop; Bielik, Klarer, Davies, Cochrane; Paik, Iwata; Harris, Willumsson, Stansfield; May

arts.ttl: Birmingham City set to be without six players for Barnsley clash
arts.sum: Wingers Hansson and Wright have been sidelined for around six weeks now, while Sampsted has missed the last four games with an ankle injury sustained on international duty. Wright suffered an injury in training on the eve of Blues' trip to Lincoln and has now missed six games as a result.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City to cancel loan and make Romelle Donovan transfer decision
arts.sum: Romelle Donovan has returned to Birmingham City early after his loan spell at Burton Albion failed to get going. While Donovan is still eligible to feature for Burton, his loan is expected to be formally cut short in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City attacker admired by Brentford
arts.sum: Birmingham City youngster Romelle Donovan is the subject of ‘long-standing interest’ from Brentford, as detailed in a report… The post Birmingham City attacker admired by Brentford appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.sum: Birmingham City are back in action this weekend with a League One away trip to Oakwell to face… The post Laird back in: Birmingham City team news and predicted XI to face Barnsley appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Tottenham injury news: Ange Postecoglou reveals extent to hamstring injury sustained by Ben Davies
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou reveals the extent to Ben Davies's hamstring injury sustained in the 1-0 defeat to Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Preview: Barnsley vs. Birmingham City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Barnsley and Birmingham City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Alfie May takes centre stage again as Birmingham City land unwanted problem
arts.sum: May was the star of August, with four goals in his opening four League One games for Blues, but the signing of a certain Jay Stansfield saw his light fade. Blues have now beaten every team they have faced in the top-nine in League One bar Reading who took a point from St Andrew’s on the opening day.
